review_title: MyAskAI will save you time, I promise.
description: I work with a number of small businesses an this is a fast and easy way we can improve the on boarding process. They can quickly connect all of the onboarding documentation allowing new team members to ask questions and find the answers without search through files.
author: Don H.
pros: The ease of getting started is the best. I've tried numerous AI assistants and solutions to access your personal knowledge base. This one is the easiest to start. I was up in less than 5 minutes asking questions to the files
cons: The limited number of integrations is probably the biggest issue.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, this was a good chatbot app as it allweod a lot of documents to be uploaded. However the outputs I am not sure whether they took from 1 document by itself or via many different documents and synthesised/summary together.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What is unique regarding this was the fact that you could upload multiple documents (pdfs), webpages etc - in parallel. There was a limit to the number of pdf size but it was easy to manually split the pdfs in size and then upload. Some places place a limit to the number of pdfs that can be uploaded to any chatbot - but the limits here are very much generous. Documetns and webapges can have images within without need to do any formatting which made it easier.
cons: The pricing was a bit more expensve than competitors. It would be better if the subscription price can be reduced if you can integrate in your own OpenAI key. The output was decent but was limited in the sense that there was very much limited ability to converse with the chatbot beyond what was output. Very frequently the chats ceased, and limited followup questioning.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Very poor, the service was down most of the time.
author: Thomas S.
pros: it was easy to use, but the web crawling did not work
cons: they cancelled my personal account for no reason, then said I needed to use a "work" account.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Fantastic. I’ve experimented with several different tools. The platform offers everything I need to create tailored, engaging chatbots for my website. The chatbots have significantly improved customer interaction and experience, leading to increased sales and customer satisfaction. I've also enjoyed the efficiency and ease of use the platform provides, making it a breeze to manage and optimize chatbots.
author: Chris M.
pros: I like the extreme flexibility and customization it offers. It allows you to build and personalize chatbots that perfectly fit your specific needs. Additionally, the user-friendly interface and the robust features make it an excellent tool for both beginners and experts alike.
cons: It may feel a bit overwhelming for complete beginners due to the plethora of customization options. However, the platform does offer excellent customer support and detailed tutorials to help users get the hang of it quickly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: AskAI offers a variety of features, including answering questions, writing different kinds of creative text formats, and translating languages. AskAI is designed to be easy to use, with a simple and intuitive interface. AskAI is constantly learning and evolving, so it has the potential to become even more helpful and informative in the future.
cons: Limited understanding of context and nuance: AskAI sometimes struggles to understand the full context of a question or request, which can lead to inaccurate or irrelevant responses.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: So far, I need this to improve. Customer Service responded quickly initially but then took a few days for the follow up.
author: Hector C.
pros: It fulfills the novelty that I was looking for on my website.
cons: It does not function great. It needs to speak the language it is spoken to and provide more answers based on the content. My first AI straight up didn't answer simple questions like, do I get taxed on a home sale when I had added the publication for home sales from the IRS website. Things like that
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Being able to personalise AI according to my business and needs is an amazing tool
cons: the ease of access to a vast amount of personal data and content make me feel a bit uneasy on how safe this could be in case something goes wrong
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Large amount of data to be searchable with the help of ChatGPT.
author: Kamil N.
pros: Very accurate answers from my personal data.
cons: Styling my Ask AI could be better with more customization features.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It's an okay tool perhaps made better by spending money on customization or chatbot for customers
author: Jessica M.
pros: It was easy to setup and use. I was able to dive right in.
cons: It wasn't necessarily as "smart" as I needed it to be. I wanted to build a chatbot for my own research and the answers it provided were very basic and not super helpful. I was researching a complicated subject though so I am thinking this is perfect for websites and consumer/customer questions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Alexander K.
pros: easy of installation and operation + analytics
cons: very time limited free trial and no lifetime free layer
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Versatile and easy product FAQs for every visitor
author: Marcus H.
pros: The simplicity of use and the warm support of My AskAI, which has incorporated many of my wishes and ideas directly into the product development.
cons: I really can't think of anything to write here that would detract from the genius of the product. It's super easy to set up without having to know any programming and so anyone can set it up and use it or make it available to their customers.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Using MyAskAI for AI driven customer support
description: Great product, easy to use and solved our needs in a way that required minimal internal support to begin using.
author: Olivia L.
pros: Super easy to set up. My team was able to begin using the tool immediately within 5 minutes of setting up to help manage our customer support channels. It was also a less expensive solution than many other tools out there which was a huge help. We also were able to customize the branding and settings to meet our use case.
cons: No major cons just that certain features are unavailable unless you move to a higher pricing tier. I also think that it would be better if more of the bots could be connected to dynamic data sources but those are enhancements that should come with time.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Claudia S.
pros: The flexibility and huge scope of knowledge.
cons: I always still need to double-check the information given. More often than not I need to edit and cut down sentences/paragraphs. It would be amazing to connect to apps we use at work, to help us write observations, emails and reports easily.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: I have been using it to load complete instructional documentation and contracts and then asking it to pull specific informaion I need. It helps save massive amounts of time since I don't have to scroll through hge docs
author: Marc R.
pros: Super easy user interface. Clear directions and helpful chat.
cons: I don't have any major issues with the tool. I have noticed that if I ask questions using wording that may not neccessarily be tied to any of the information or sections in the information uploaded, sometimes it struggles to understand the question to give the answer.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I use it almost everyday and I’ll be making a queriable codebase repository as a next step
author: Joseph P.
pros: Askai with unlimited embeddings just becomes a sort of usual or daily necessity , integrating with other services with limited embeddings
cons: It’s too easy to make an askai , but it works great
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Harry R.
pros: The customisation is so important to me in the role we're giving it. It's also very important to me that it logs all conversations, allowing us to check for any issues or inappropriate usage.
cons: I'd like to be able to go further along the road with the customised background prompt, to be honest I'm not sure how that would even work though!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Important step towards an easy integration of AI into our membership relations management
description: We started out of curiosity. It was a great experience right from the start. We didn't need to involve developers or administrators of our webpage. It worked right away.
author: Philipp E.
pros: It was easy to integrate into our webpage. So, we can support our front desk employee and also give 24/7 replies to frequently asked questions.
cons: Some of the new and cool features are not available on the smallest contract.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: My AskAI is the fast solution for custom Chatbots
description: We will consider to use My AskAI in future for our stores.
author: Patrick W.
pros: I really liked the speed to set up the Chatbot.
cons: I am missing other languages in the backend
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Jennifer K.
pros: This is obviously an innovative feature and it's exciting. The software is very straightforward and easy to use.
cons: Nothing yet...the real test will be making sure we load in enough content to get the AI to respond appropriately to user questions.
author_profession: Head of Risk Management, Technology Architect
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Clean, easy to use interface. Was able to quickly prototype a web application with chatbot functionality.
author: Richard B.
pros: Was easy to use and set up. Bubble plug in functionality was super helpful.
cons: On the free version so a bit limited but worked well for a prototype.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Nice system that's really easy to set up and use
author: Carl M.
pros: really quick and easy to build your own chatbot - we use it for our staff handbook
cons: I needed a bit of help to integrate in our sharepoint intranet - but their support were good
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent way to deploy AI for your business
description: Solved an issue with deploying AI for small businesses
author: Doug D.
pros: You can add your own content to the tool so answers are company centric.
cons: Would like option to extend its knowledge interactively as needed.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: I tried the free trial, but didn't subscribe.... yet
description: My AskAI is going to help solve the perennial problem of getting quick but accurate answers to the end user. Infobases are great, but people get lost in looking for answers. Harnessing AI to build answers using trusted data is going to be a huge growth area.
author: David B.
pros: The concept is brilliant - harness the power of AI, but limit it to the trusted info that you provide. This is the future of AI, and I'm looking for this concept to expand.
cons: The price gap between the Hobby and Pro. Hobby is too small, and Pro is too much. I'd like to see a mid-range product.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall this is solving the issue of the challenge of deploying and training on company materials
author: Josh G.
pros: We're loving having this product as a better way to deploy our employee manual and policies and procedures.
cons: My biggest con is that the interface functions fairly slowly. They need to speed up their website.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Randy F.
pros: Very simple to implement. Compared to other options I find that this platform is easy to implement.
cons: Although I'm using the free version, to upgrade I find it to be moderately expensive.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
